title: International commodities and domestic grocery prices
description: Compare timing and persistence; exchange rates, processing, transport, labour, margins, taxes, and domestic supply separate commodity and retail prices.
plainLanguageSummary: Compare timing and persistence; exchange rates, processing, transport, labour, margins, taxes, and domestic supply separate commodity and retail prices.
howToRead: Compare direction, turning points, and sustained divergences. Use the tooltip for exact values and observation dates; visual alignment alone does not establish causation.

calculation.formula: Published indices and explicitly labelled derived changes; no interpolation across native frequencies.
calculation.explanation: Compare timing and persistence; exchange rates, processing, transport, labour, margins, taxes, and domestic supply separate commodity and retail prices.
calculation.example: A value at date t uses only observations dated t or earlier unless the chart explicitly labels a visual shift.

patternsToWatch: Turning points or divergences that repeat across historical episodes
limitations: Compare timing and persistence; exchange rates, processing, transport, labour, margins, taxes, and domestic supply separate commodity and retail prices.
